## 📋 PR Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix — fixes a broken or incorrect behaviour
- [ ] ✨ Feature — adds new functionality
- [ ] 🔧 Enhancement — improves existing functionality or UX
- [ ] 📝 Documentation — updates docs, README, comments
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI — visual or design-only changes (no logic change)
- [ ] ♻️  Refactor — code restructuring with no functional change
- [ ] 🧪 Tests — adds or updates tests
- [ ] 🔒 Security — addresses a security concern
- [ ] ⚡ Performance — improves speed or efficiency

---

## 🏷️ Label

`bug` · `enhancement` · `feature` · `documentation` · `ui/ux` · `refactor` · `performance` · `security` · `good first issue` · `help wanted`

## 🧹 Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up-to-date with `main`
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally (`python app.py`)
- [ ] No new print / debug statements left in code
- [ ] I have not committed `.env` or any API keys
- [ ] I have updated README if my change affects setup or usage
- [ ] I have added inline comments for complex logic
- [ ] My code follows the project style (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have assigned the correct label(s) to this PR
